core_mechanism: free-fermion (second-quantization) construction: encoding combinatorial objects as states in a fermionic Fock space acted on by products of vertex (creation/annihilation) operators, so that inner products / expectation values factorize via Wick's theorem into determinants of a two-point correlation kernel — i.e. a determinantal point process
brief_reason: The abstract builds partition-indexed vectors from products of adjoint vertex operators in Fock space and uses a free fermionic construction to show the associated measures are determinantal with respect to explicit correlation kernels.
